summary: Tested enterprise security features: Identity & Attestation, Policy Engine, Token Broker, CLI Tool Gateway, and Tamper-Evident Telemetry. All 26 backend tests passed after fixing route ordering issue in enterprise.py.
passed_tests: GET /api/enterprise/status - Returns enterprise security status with identity, policy, tokens, tools, telemetry sections
GET /api/enterprise/tools - Returns 7 registered CLI tools (process_list, process_kill, network_connections, firewall_block, file_hash, memory_dump, suricata_reload_rules)
GET /api/enterprise/tools/{tool_id} - Returns specific tool definition with args_schema, allowed_flags, min_trust_state
GET /api/enterprise/tools/status - Returns gateway status with registered_tools count and total_executions
POST /api/enterprise/policy/evaluate - Evaluates observe action (auto-approve for trusted agents)
POST /api/enterprise/policy/evaluate - Evaluates remediate action (require_approval tier)
POST /api/enterprise/policy/evaluate - Denies action for quarantined agents
GET /api/enterprise/policy/pending - Returns pending approvals list
GET /api/enterprise/policy/status - Returns action_categories (observe, collect, contain, remediate, credential, deception) and approval_tiers (auto, suggest, require_approval, two_person)
GET /api/enterprise/telemetry/verify - Verifies chain integrity (integrity_verified=true)
POST /api/enterprise/telemetry/event - Ingests event into tamper-evident chain with event_hash and prev_hash
GET /api/enterprise/telemetry/events - Queries telemetry events
GET /api/enterprise/telemetry/audit - Queries audit trail records
GET /api/enterprise/identity - Returns registered identities list
GET /api/enterprise/identity/nonce - Returns one-time nonce for attestation (32 hex chars, 60s validity)
POST /api/enterprise/identity/attest - Registers identity with SPIFFE-style ID and trust scoring
GET /api/enterprise/identity/{agent_id} - Returns specific identity with trust_state and trust_score
GET /api/enterprise/token/active - Returns active capability tokens
POST /api/enterprise/token/issue - Issues scoped capability token with principal binding, TTL, max_uses
GET /api/enterprise/token/status - Returns broker status (active_tokens, revoked_tokens, stored_secrets)
POST /api/enterprise/token/revoke/{token_id} - Revokes capability token
IdentityService has trust scoring (calculate_trust_score, determine_trust_state, TrustState enum)
PolicyEngine has action categories (observe, collect, contain, remediate, credential, deception)
TokenBroker has capability tokens (issue_token, validate_token, revoke_token)
ToolGateway has 7 registered tools with governed execution
TamperEvidentTelemetry has hash chains (verify_chain_integrity, event_chain, audit_chain)

fixes_applied.issue: Route ordering issue - /tools/status was matched by /tools/{tool_id} treating 'status' as tool_id

seed_data_creation: Created test identities (test-enterprise-agent-001, test-identity-lookup-agent) and test tokens during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All enterprise security features are working: 1) Identity & Attestation - SPIFFE-style IDs, trust scoring (0-100), trust states (trusted/degraded/unknown/quarantined). 2) Policy Engine - 6 action categories (observe/collect/contain/remediate/credential/deception), 4 approval tiers (auto/suggest/require_approval/two_person), rate limits, blast-radius caps. 3) Token Broker - capability tokens with principal binding, TTLs, max_uses. 4) Tool Gateway - 7 registered CLI tools (process_list, process_kill, network_connections, firewall_block, file_hash, memory_dump, suricata_reload_rules). 5) Tamper-Evident Telemetry - hash chains, signed events, audit trail, chain integrity verification.
